entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT

entities.name: ADAPTIVE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A systematic process for improving management policies and practices by learning from the outcomes of implemented strategies

entities.name: IMPACT TRACKING
entities.description: A practitioner-developed approach used to scale AR4D innovations and track their impact

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the case studies for Impact Tracking were conducted

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INNOVATION
entities.description: New ideas, methods, or products applied to agriculture to improve productivity or sustainability
